name: Caramel Chocolate Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
2. Combine caramels and 1/3 cup evaporated milk in a heavy saucepan. Heat and stir until blended; keep warm.
3. In a bowl, combine the dry cake mix, melted butter, and 1/3 cup evaporated milk. Mix well.
4. Spread half of the mixture in the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 6 minutes. Immediately sprinkle chocolate over the hot layer; drizzle with caramel mixture.
6. Spread the remaining batter evenly over the top.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 15 to 18 minutes, or until the top looks dry.
8. Cool on a rack; cut into fingers, about 3 x 1 inch. Makes 3 dozen bars.
